faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our hosting in one place.

items.question: How long does server activation take?
items.answer: Activation is immediate after payment is received. For most payment methods, it's a matter of seconds.

items.question: What DDoS protection do you use?
items.answer: We use enterprise solutions with over 12 Tbps capacity that can filter even the most complex application layer attacks.

items.question: Can I change my plan anytime?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime directly in the client administration. The price difference is calculated automatically.

items.question: Do you backup my data?
items.answer: Yes, we perform automatic daily backups of all servers. Backups are stored for 7 days in a separate location.

items.question: I'm switching from competition, will you help me?
items.answer: We'll be happy to help you with migrating all data. Plus, you'll get free hosting for the duration you've paid at your current hosting provider.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: Our client zone supports card payments and bank transfers. If you prefer another method, just contact us and we'll figure it out!

1.title: 1. Data Controller
1.content: The data controller is the individual Patrik Vlček, operating the FirtCore.cz portal, VAT: CZ23266023, with registered address Na Škvárovně 522, 549 32 Velké Poříčí, Czech Republic, doing business as a self-employed person (hereinafter referred to as the 'Controller'). The Controller hereby informs you, in accordance with Article 12 GDPR, about the processing of your personal data and about your rights.

1.title: 1. Basic Provisions
1.content: These general terms and conditions (hereinafter referred to as 'Terms and Conditions') are issued pursuant to Section 1751 et seq. of Act No. 89/2012 Coll., the Civil Code.

reviews.title: What our clients say
reviews.subtitle: Over 500 satisfied customers trust us. Read their experiences.

items.name: maxinoo7
items.text: I bought the discord bot - pro package for 60 CZK/month and personally I think the price/performance ratio is absolutely OP. I haven't encountered any problems yet, which I'm glad for ;) 9.5/10

items.name: Art Vik (art333vik)
items.text: I had the opportunity to try your minecraft hosting, and I'm very satisfied! The helpers quickly prepared it for me and helped with the setup, and the server itself was great: plenty of options, no lags or other technical issues. 9/10
